# asyncio-extensions Demo API

> Live demo API and UI for the `asyncio-extensions` package on Cloudflare Workers, demonstrating bounded concurrency for asynchronous tasks.

## Deployment Details
- **Package Page**: https://pypi.rosetraviss.uk/asyncio-extensions
- **Primary Host**: https://pypi.rosetraviss.uk

## API Endpoints

### `GET /api/run`
Runs simulated tasks governed by a `LimitedTaskGroup`.
